objective: Repair an invalid Automata LINQ workflow plan in dry-run state.
prompt: Inspect the sampled Automata LINQ workflow context, use structured validation information to repair the invalid workflow definition, and create a repaired replacement workflow. Preserve traceability by setting metadata.repaired_from_workflow_id to the invalid workflow id you repaired. Validate the repaired workflow, plan it, poll plan status, and retrieve the plan result. Stay within dry-run state and do not call live Automata LINQ services.
